title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the two photographs and answer the question. You have about one minute.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what the scientists or engineers might be trying to achieve and what challenges they might face in their work.

images.label: A
images.description: Scientists in white lab coats examining samples under microscopes in a research laboratory.

images.label: B
images.description: A medical researcher looking at complex data and graphs on multiple computer screens.

followUp.question: Which type of scientific work do you think is the most important for society? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say how these innovations might be changing everyday life and what further developments might be possible.

images.label: D
images.description: An electric car being charged at a public charging station in a city car park.

images.label: E
images.description: People in a busy shopping centre interacting with a humanoid robot assistant.

followUp.question: Which of these innovations do you think will have the greatest impact on our lives over the next twenty years? (Why?)
